# ClarityForge Studios

> ClarityForge Studios is a boutique B2B media and authority-building agency serving energy sector leaders, policy experts, and organizations. We diagnose and close the gap between expertise and public influence by building distribution infrastructure — podcasts, video, LinkedIn systems, and executive visibility programs — for credible expert voices.

Founded by Nate Peavey. Based in Bend, Oregon. Energy sector only.

## What we do

ClarityForge operates three service lanes:

- **Podcast Production**: Full-service podcast development and production for energy organizations, from strategy through distribution. Producer of Energy Capital Podcast with Joshua Rhodes, PhD and Matt Boms.
- **Executive Visibility**: LinkedIn and thought leadership systems for energy executives and experts, including ghostwriting, content strategy, and distribution operations.
- **Strategic Media Partner**: Embedded media and content operations for energy organizations building long-term authority, including Project Vanguard (veteran-led energy workforce initiative).

## Who we serve

Energy sector only — utilities, grid operators, energy policy organizations, workforce initiatives, and individual experts (researchers, executives, analysts) whose expertise is structurally drowned out by algorithmic media and AI-generated content.

## Key resources

- [Services overview](https://clarityforgestudios.com/services): Three service lanes and how they work together
- [Podcast Production](https://clarityforgestudios.com/podcast-production): Full-service energy podcast development
- [Executive Visibility](https://clarityforgestudios.com/executive-visibility): LinkedIn and thought leadership systems
- [Strategic Partnerships](https://clarityforgestudios.com/strategic-partnerships): Embedded media operations
- [Work](https://clarityforgestudios.com/work): Case studies including Energy Capital Podcast and Project Vanguard
- [About](https://clarityforgestudios.com/about): Founder background and company mission
- [Content Cost Calculator](https://clarityforgestudios.com/content-cost-calculator): Interactive tool for estimating internal content production cost
- [LinkedIn 2026 Readiness Diagnostic](https://clarityforgestudios.com/linkedin-2026): Interactive diagnostic scoring a leader's or organization's LinkedIn strategy against the four 2026 algorithm shifts (slow burn, personal vs. page, repost decision, interest clusters)
- [Spot the Technique](https://clarityforgestudios.com/spot-the-technique): Interactive critical thinking tool teaching recognition of 18 manipulation techniques in energy and science discourse, including logical fallacies (false dichotomy, strawman, ad hominem, hasty generalization, slippery slope, correlation-causation, false cause) and rhetorical tactics (cherry-picking, whataboutism, fake expert, manufactured doubt, misleading chart, moving the goalposts, appeal to nature, appeal to emotion, bandwagon, equivocation, appeal to tradition). Two modes: a Daily Drill served once per day from a bank of 30 scenarios, and a full quiz that randomly draws 12 scenarios from a separate bank of 18. Total scenario library: 48.
- [Blog](https://clarityforgestudios.com/blog): The Forge — writing on the gap between expertise and public influence

## Proof points

- 100% client retention
- 120% average client reach growth in first six months
- Millions of impressions per month across clients
- Producer of Energy Capital Podcast (texasenergyandpower.com)
- Retained media partner for Project Vanguard
